title: crotalaria arenaria
intro: Crotalaria arenaria, also known as Beachrue or Stinking Bean, is a tropical plant species belonging to the legume family and is commonly found in coastal regions of tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria arenaria include its potential in treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to act as a natural insect repellent. Crotalaria arenaria can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are often used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
